text.title: Custom Guardrails Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: 7 steps to ship a working custom pipeline.

step.name: scaffold-detectors
step.action: Create `pii_detector.py` and `injection_detector.py` with compiled regex sets per `01-core-rules`.

step.name: wire-moderator
step.action: Wrap `client.moderations.create` in `ContentModerator.acheck(text)` returning `(flagged: bool, categories: dict)`.

step.name: wire-judge
step.action: Build `HallucinationDetector.acheck(response, context)` with `response_format=json_object` and a strict prompt.
step.output: Async hallucination client returning `{is_grounded, unsupported_claims, confidence}`.

step.name: config
step.action: Define `GuardrailConfig` dataclass with `enable_*` boolean flags and `max_input_length / max_output_length` ints.

step.name: compose-pipeline
step.action: Build `GuardrailsPipeline` with `process_input`, `process_output`, `run`. `process_input` uses `asyncio.gather` for independent checks; obeys `none-means-block`.
step.decision-gate: If `process_input` returns `(None, _)`, `run()` must NOT call the LLM. Asserted by smoke test.

step.name: integrate-middleware
step.action: Wrap pipeline as middleware: FastAPI `BaseHTTPMiddleware`, LangChain `RunnableLambda`, LlamaIndex `NodeParser`. Inject from app DI.

step.name: smoke-test
step.input: Smoke fixtures: 1 clean prompt, 1 PII prompt, 1 injection prompt
step.action: Run pipeline; assert clean → `is_safe=True`, PII → `input_modified=True`, injection → `is_safe=False` + `sanitized_input=None`.
step.output: Green smoke output OR violations report.
